texto: A tragedy need not have blood and death
autor: it's enough that it all be filled with that majestic sadness that is the pleasure of tragedy.
explicacao: Citação de it's enough that it all be filled with that majestic sadness that is the pleasure of tragedy. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “A tragedy need not have blood and death” articula reflexao, jean-racine, tragedy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
